languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

languages.text: "Ох, все эти машинные запахи... с тех пор как Сектор заработал в полную силу, тут теперь не продохнуть от этой вони. Еще и духота... кое-кто понежнее может и упасть без чувств!"
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to Medbay after the Rogue Trader banned the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

"Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

languages.text: 「ああ、機械の匂いばかり…このエリアが稼働し始めてから、この部屋の臭いは呼吸を純粋な苦痛にしている。そして、この蒸し暑さ…繊細な患者の中には、気絶してしまう人もいるかもしれない！」
languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、機械の匂いばかり…このエリアが稼働し始めてから、この部屋の臭いは呼吸を純粋な苦痛にしている。そして、この蒸し暑さ…繊細な患者の中には、気絶してしまう人もいるかもしれない！」

languages.text: « Oh, toutes ces odeurs de machines... Maintenant que le secteur est pleinement opérationnel, c'est de la torture de respirer dans cette puanteur, et je ne parle même pas de l'atmosphère étouffante... Les patients les plus délicats risquent de s'évanouir ! »
languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

traits.locale_text: « Oh, toutes ces odeurs de machines... Maintenant que le secteur est pleinement opérationnel, c'est de la torture de respirer dans cette puanteur, et je ne parle même pas de l'atmosphère étouffante... Les patients les plus délicats risquent de s'évanouir ! »

languages.text: "Oh, all diese Maschinengerüche ... seit der Sektor voll funktionsfähig ist, macht der Gestank hier drin das Atmen zur Qual. Und diese Schwüle ... Einige der empfindlicheren Patienten könnten ohnmächtig werden!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, all diese Maschinengerüche ... seit der Sektor voll funktionsfähig ist, macht der Gestank hier drin das Atmen zur Qual. Und diese Schwüle ... Einige der empfindlicheren Patienten könnten ohnmächtig werden!"

languages.text: "Tüm bu makine kokuları... Sektör tam olarak faaliyete geçtiğinden beri buradaki koku nefes almayı saf bir işkenceye dönüştürdü. Bir de havasızlık... Daha hassas hastalardan bazıları bayılabilir!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

traits.locale_text: "Tüm bu makine kokuları... Sektör tam olarak faaliyete geçtiğinden beri buradaki koku nefes almayı saf bir işkenceye dönüştürdü. Bir de havasızlık... Daha hassas hastalardan bazıları bayılabilir!"

languages.text: «Oh, cuánto olor a máquina... desde que el Sector empezó a funcionar a pleno rendimiento, el hedor es tan insoportable que respirar es una tortura. Y con tan poca ventilación... ¡algunos de los pacientes más delicados podrían desmayarse!».
languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

traits.locale_text: «Oh, cuánto olor a máquina... desde que el Sector empezó a funcionar a pleno rendimiento, el hedor es tan insoportable que respirar es una tortura. Y con tan poca ventilación... ¡algunos de los pacientes más delicados podrían desmayarse!».

languages.text: “啊，这满屋子的油污味儿……自仿生区完全运转以来，这儿的恶臭简直堪比酷刑！还这么闷热……那些娇贵些的病人恐怕要晕过去了！”
languages.original_text: "Oh, all those machine smells... ever since the Sector became fully operational, the stench in here has made breathing pure torture. And the stuffiness... Some of the more delicate patients might faint!"

traits.locale_text: “啊，这满屋子的油污味儿……自仿生区完全运转以来，这儿的恶臭简直堪比酷刑！还这么闷热……那些娇贵些的病人恐怕要晕过去了！”
